description_long: This is a sparse, wilting potted plant with long, thin green stems and very few leaves, many of which have fallen onto the ground around the pot. The plant is housed in a simple, brown, square-tapered pot filled with soil. The stems are irregularly bent and extend outward in various directions, giving the plant a neglected or dying appearance. The pot itself is plain and unadorned, with a matte finish and no visible decorative elements. The fallen leaves are scattered unevenly around the base, emphasizing the plant's unhealthy state. This object would typically be found in urban environments such as sidewalks, patios, or near building entrances.
description: A sparse, wilting potted plant with long, thin green stems and many fallen leaves, set in a plain brown square pot. The plant appears neglected and is surrounded by scattered leaves.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the plant from above and slightly to the side, highlighting the sparse stems and a cluster of fallen leaves mostly on the right side of the pot.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the plant from the opposite side, with the longest stem arching to the right and more leaves scattered widely around the pot.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the plant from a front-facing angle, emphasizing the curved stems and a dense grouping of fallen leaves in front of the pot.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the plant from the back, with the longest stem extending leftward and the majority of fallen leaves spread out behind the pot.
